project_type: Next.js API + React frontend + Supabase sync layer
baseline_snapshot: Current hotfix head under review is 4a20bf3 after b0645eb.
platform_states still uses a canonical unique contract on (user_id, platform_id).
Migration 019 adds current_scene, global_flags, and patterns but does not change uniqueness.
Focused tests passed: npx vitest run tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts tests/sync-queue.test.ts -> 2 files, 63 tests passed.
Production health is green: /api/health returned healthy on 2026-03-14T02:28:56Z.
Production DB health is green: /api/health/db returned healthy on 2026-03-14T02:28:57Z.
Release smoke currently checks health, unauthenticated session, unauthenticated advisor briefing, and CSP only.
User-provided production console logs on 2026-03-13 showed repeated POST /api/user/platform-state 500s and repeated sync retries.

findings.title: SyncQueue does not persist incremented retry counts for transient failures
findings.impact: Transient sync failures can remain effectively immortal in the queue, causing repeated retries, noisy logs, and unnecessary user-facing degradation.
evidence: lib/sync-queue.ts:743-787 increments retries into failedActions but persists remainingQueue instead of the incremented copies.
tests/sync-queue.test.ts:383-441 only asserts retries >= 0 rather than asserting incremented retry state.
Focused run passed despite the gap: npx vitest run tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts tests/sync-queue.test.ts -> 63 tests passed.
findings.root_cause: Retry bookkeeping is updated in a temporary failedActions list but never written back into persisted queue state.
findings.fix: Persist incremented failed actions back into the queue and add explicit tests for retry increments and max-retry eviction.
verification: Add a test that a 500 response changes stored retries from 0 to 1.
Add a test that an action is removed after the configured max retries.
prod_verification: Historical user console logs on 2026-03-13 showed repeated retry warnings for the same sync surface.
Current audit did not inspect persisted retry counters directly in production.

findings.title: /api/user/platform-state accepts raw unknown fields and turns malformed payloads into server errors
findings.impact: Malformed or off-version client payloads become 500s instead of 400s, which obscures blame and drives unnecessary retries.
evidence: app/api/user/platform-state/route.ts:40-69 casts the body to Record<string, unknown> and forwards current_scene, global_flags, and patterns without schema validation.
User-provided production logs from 2026-03-13 showed repeated POST https://lux-story.vercel.app/api/user/platform-state 500 responses and sync retry warnings.
tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:97-184 has no invalid-payload coverage for platform-state.
findings.root_cause: The route relies on database rejection instead of validating request shape at the API boundary.
findings.fix: Add strict request validation for platform-state payloads and return 400s before profile ensure or database writes.
verification: Add tests for invalid global_flags, invalid patterns, and oversized bodies returning 400.
Manual smoke: invalid platform-state POST returns 400 with a validation error.
prod_verification: Historical production logs showed this route returning 500 before the hotfix.
Current audit rechecked only /api/health and /api/health/db, not the invalid-payload path on prod.

findings.title: Release verification omits the authenticated platform-state write path
findings.impact: Authenticated route or schema drift can pass release verification and only fail in live sessions.
evidence: package.json:48-52 wires deploy through release:gate only.
package.json:105 defines verify:release-smoke but it is not part of release:gate or deploy.
scripts/ci/release-smoke.mjs:69-107 checks health and unauthenticated paths only.
findings.root_cause: Release verification is health-oriented and unauthenticated while the broken path was authenticated and stateful.
findings.fix: Add authenticated profile bootstrap plus platform-state write/read smoke coverage to release verification.
verification: Extend release-smoke to exercise authenticated POST /api/user/profile and POST/GET /api/user/platform-state.
Confirm release verification fails when the platform-state contract is intentionally broken in a local branch.
prod_verification: Current production health endpoints are healthy, but current automated smoke still does not cover authenticated write paths.

findings.title: platform-state tests do not assert the live table contract or invalid-body behavior
findings.impact: Tests can stay green while the route drifts away from the actual table contract or returns the wrong error class for malformed input.
evidence: tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:20-45 uses a generic mocked Supabase chain that does not inspect upsert payload or onConflict options.
tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:110-137 only asserts 200 success and ensurePlayerProfile call.
tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:152-166 allows a minimal payload but does not test malformed gameplay fields.
Focused run passed: npx vitest run tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts tests/sync-queue.test.ts -> 63 tests passed.
findings.root_cause: Route tests are centered on response status and auth gates rather than contract details and boundary behavior.
findings.fix: Capture upsert payload and options in tests and add invalid-body assertions.
verification: Add tests that assert platform_id = global, onConflict = user_id,platform_id, and invalid payloads return 400.
prod_verification: Historical production incident escaped the current test suite before hotfix.

findings.title: Admin service-role helper is still not guarded as server-only
findings.impact: A future accidental client import can reintroduce browser warnings or server-only assumptions into client bundles.
evidence: lib/admin-supabase-client.ts:1-23 has no import 'server-only' guard despite exposing service-role client creation.
lib/admin-supabase-client.ts:207-219 logs missing SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY warnings when imported without server envs.
User-provided browser logs from 2026-03-13 showed [AdminSupabase] Missing env vars: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY. Database operations will be skipped.
findings.root_cause: Server-only capability is enforced by convention instead of module-level import boundaries.
findings.fix: Add import 'server-only' and separate any browser-safe helpers from the service-role module.
verification: Add a check that client modules cannot import admin-supabase-client.
Verify a fresh browser session no longer shows the admin env warning.
prod_verification: Historical browser warning was observed before the hotfix.
Current audit did not reproduce the warning on the latest bundle.

root_cause_clusters.title: Boundary contract hardening gap
root_cause_clusters.summary: The platform-state route is loosely validated at the API edge and loosely asserted in tests, so malformed payloads and contract drift surface as runtime incidents instead of deterministic failures.
root_cause_clusters.primary_fix: Add strict request validation plus contract-aware route tests.

root_cause_clusters.title: Retry semantics gap
root_cause_clusters.summary: Transient-failure bookkeeping is not persisted back into queue state, so retry ceilings are not reliably enforced.
root_cause_clusters.primary_fix: Persist incremented failed actions and add tests for retry exhaustion.

root_cause_clusters.title: Release verification gap
root_cause_clusters.summary: Deploy verification checks liveness and unauthenticated paths but not authenticated stateful writes.
root_cause_clusters.primary_fix: Add authenticated platform-state smoke coverage to release verification.

root_cause_clusters.title: Server/client boundary discipline gap
root_cause_clusters.summary: Server-only capabilities are still partially protected by convention instead of import-level guards.
root_cause_clusters.primary_fix: Mark service-role helpers as server-only and keep browser-safe helpers separate.

fix_queue.title: Fix persisted retry accounting in SyncQueue
fix_queue.description: Transient failures are counted in memory but the incremented retry state is not written back into persisted queue storage.
evidence: lib/sync-queue.ts:743-787
tests/sync-queue.test.ts:383-441
proposed_fix: Persist incremented failed actions instead of the stale queue snapshot.
Add tests for retry increment and max-retry eviction.
Verify browser retry churn stops after the configured max retries.
acceptance_criteria: A transient 500 increments stored retry count after the first failure.
A queued action is removed once max retries are reached.
Queue stats reflect real retry counts.
verification_steps: Run a browser smoke with forced transient failures.
prod_verification: Historical user console logs showed repeated retry warnings on 2026-03-13.

fix_queue.title: Add strict request validation to /api/user/platform-state
fix_queue.description: Malformed platform-state payloads currently fall through to the database layer and return server errors instead of client errors.
evidence: app/api/user/platform-state/route.ts:40-69
User production console logs from 2026-03-13
tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:97-184
fix_queue.root_cause: No strict API boundary validation exists for the platform-state payload.
proposed_fix: Add Zod validation for user_id, current_scene, global_flags, patterns, and payload size.
Return 400 for invalid payloads before profile ensure or database writes.
Ensure sync queue treats validation failures as permanent.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid payloads return 400 with a stable error shape.
Valid payloads still write canonical platform_id = global rows.
Malformed actions are not endlessly retried.
verification_steps: Run npx vitest run tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts tests/sync-queue.test.ts.
Manually POST valid and invalid platform-state payloads.
prod_verification: Historical production logs showed 500s on malformed platform-state sync before the hotfix.
Current audit did not rerun the invalid-payload path on prod.

fix_queue.title: Add contract-aware tests and authenticated release smoke for platform-state
fix_queue.description: Current test and release verification paths do not assert the live platform-state contract or exercise the authenticated write path that regressed.
evidence: tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:20-45
tests/api/user-endpoints.test.ts:110-137
package.json:48-52
package.json:105
scripts/ci/release-smoke.mjs:69-107
fix_queue.root_cause: Contract-aware assertions and authenticated deployment smoke are missing.
proposed_fix: Capture upsert payload and onConflict arguments in route tests.
Extend release smoke to POST /api/user/profile and POST/GET /api/user/platform-state with an authenticated test user.
acceptance_criteria: Route tests fail if platform_id or onConflict drift.
Release verification fails on authenticated route/schema drift.
Deploy logs show authenticated smoke coverage ran.
verification_steps: Run BASE_URL=<deploy-url> node scripts/ci/release-smoke.mjs with authenticated smoke enabled.
prod_verification: Current prod health is green but the automated smoke still does not cover authenticated write paths.

fix_queue.title: Enforce server-only import boundaries for admin service-role helpers
fix_queue.description: The admin service-role helper is still importable by client code because the module is not explicitly server-only.
evidence: lib/admin-supabase-client.ts:1-23
lib/admin-supabase-client.ts:207-219
User browser logs from 2026-03-13
fix_queue.root_cause: Server/client boundaries rely on developer discipline instead of import guards.
proposed_fix: Split any browser-safe helpers into a separate module if needed.
Add a build or unit check that client code cannot import the module.
acceptance_criteria: Client imports of admin-supabase-client fail deterministically.
Fresh browser sessions no longer emit the admin env warning.
verification_steps: Run a fresh browser smoke on affected flows.
prod_verification: Historical browser warning was observed before the hotfix.
Current audit did not reproduce the warning on the latest bundle.

top_3_risks: Retry ceilings are not reliably enforced for transient sync failures.
Malformed platform-state payloads still degrade into server errors instead of client errors.
Deploy verification can miss authenticated write-path regressions.
top_3_quick_wins: Persist incremented retry counts in SyncQueue.
Add authenticated release smoke for profile bootstrap plus platform-state write/read.
human_verification_needed: Confirm malformed platform-state requests return 400 in deployed runtime after validation is added.
Confirm a fresh browser bundle no longer logs the admin env warning after server-only guards are added.
Confirm real browser retries stop after the configured max retry count.
summary.recommended_next_run: Run a second diff-first audit over the remaining /api/user/* sync routes after AQ-001 through AQ-004 land.
